/usr/bin/aarch64-linux-gnu-g++ --sysroot=/mnt  -fuse-ld=gold CMakeFiles/rtspMulitPlayer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtspMulitPlayer.dir/src/capturer/capturer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtspMulitPlayer.dir/src/capturer/decChannel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtspMulitPlayer.dir/src/analyzer/algoProcess.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtspMulitPlayer.dir/src/analyzer/analyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtspMulitPlayer.dir/src/analyzer/display.c.o CMakeFiles/rtspMulitPlayer.dir/opt/EASY-EAI-Toolkit/EASY-EAI-Toolkit-3562/easyeai-api/common/base64/base64.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtspMulitPlayer.dir/opt/EASY-EAI-Toolkit/EASY-EAI-Toolkit-3562/easyeai-api/common/system_opt/system_opt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtspMulitPlayer.dir/opt/EASY-EAI-Toolkit/EASY-EAI-Toolkit-3562/easyeai-api/media/rga/rga_wrapper.c.o -o rtspMulitPlayer   -L/opt/EASY-EAI-Toolkit/EASY-EAI-Toolkit-3562/easyeai-api/common/log_manager  -L/opt/EASY-EAI-Toolkit/EASY-EAI-Toolkit-3562/easyeai-api/media/gst_opt  -L/opt/EASY-EAI-Toolkit/EASY-EAI-Toolkit-3562/easyeai-api/algorithm/person_detect  -L/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/lapack  -L/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/blas  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/EASY-EAI-Toolkit/EASY-EAI-Toolkit-3562/easyeai-api/common/log_manager:/opt/EASY-EAI-Toolkit/EASY-EAI-Toolkit-3562/easyeai-api/media/gst_opt:/opt/EASY-EAI-Toolkit/EASY-EAI-Toolkit-3562/easyeai-api/algorithm/person_detect:/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/lapack:/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/blas -ldrm -lrga -lopencv_core -lopencv_imgproc -lopencv_imgcodecs -lstdc++ -lpthread -lstdc++ -llog_manager -lini -lpthread -lstdc++ -lpthread -lgst_opt -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lgstvideo-1.0 -lgstbase-1.0 -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lgstrtspserver-1.0 -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lperson_detect -lrknnrt -lopencv_core -lopencv_imgproc -lopencv_imgcodecs -lpthread -lstdc++ -llog_manager -lini -lgst_opt -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lgstvideo-1.0 -lgstbase-1.0 -lgstrtspserver-1.0 -lperson_detect -lrknnrt
